args.sql: SELECT b.bygningid, b.navnerom, b.representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_e58ed5b5abd74bc1a42ff55d569f0cf4.bygning b JOIN matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig t ON ST_Intersects(b.representasjonspunkt, t.geom) WHERE t.kommunenummer = '4250' AND t.teigid IN (SELECT teigid FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, (SELECT ST_Union(omrade) FROM flomsoner_92001766ec964ab8b545fef0a00e6d23.analyseomrade WHERE returnperiod = 200 AND flomtype = 'F')) AND ST_Intersects(geom, (SELECT ST_Union(omrade) FROM stormflohavniva.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE returnperiod = 200 AND flomtype = 'F')) LIMIT 10;
